hero.title: Patricio Anabalon
hero.tagline: 18+ years crafting digital experiences — now heading to Auckland.

about.heading: About Me
about.bio1: I'm a Senior Software Engineer with over 18 years of experience building high-impact digital products for industries ranging from aviation to fintech. Currently at LATAM Airlines, I lead front-end development for one of Latin America's largest e-commerce platforms.
about.bio2: Beyond code, I'm a creator — I work with After Effects, DaVinci Resolve, and Premiere to produce audiovisual content that blends storytelling with technical precision. I believe great software and great design share the same root: intentionality.
about.bio3: I'm relocating to Auckland, New Zealand, and excited to bring my decade-and-a-half of engineering experience to innovative teams in NZ.

experience.heading: Experience
experience.subheading: A career built on delivery, leadership & continuous growth

milestones.latamAward: LATAM Service Leader — recognized for Safety, Sustainability and J.E.T.S. values
milestones.globantAward: Constantly Innovate — annual company-wide recognition at Globant
milestones.startupChile: Selected for Start-Up Chile G19 acceleration programme

creative.heading: Creative Work
creative.subheading: Audiovisual production, motion graphics & visual design
creative.description: Outside of engineering, I create audiovisual content — from motion graphics to video production. I use After Effects, DaVinci Resolve, Adobe Premiere, and Photoshop to tell stories through moving images.

contact.heading: Let's Talk
contact.subheading: Open to opportunities in Auckland, New Zealand
contact.description: Whether you're looking for a senior engineer to lead a team, architect a system, or craft exceptional user experiences — I'd love to connect.
